hero.subtitle: Monitor air quality, detect high-pollen districts, and receive real-time health alerts powered by environmental data and AI.

prevention.title: Asthma Prevention Tips
prevention.subtitle: Important steps to protect yourself and manage attacks effectively.

breathe.title: Stay Calm & Breathe Slowly
breathe.description: Sit upright, take slow deep breaths, and try to stay calm during an attack.

inhaler.title: Use Your Inhaler
inhaler.description: Follow your prescribed inhaler routine. Take quick-relief medication as directed.

avoid.title: Avoid Triggers
avoid.description: Stay away from smoke, dust, pollen, or strong odors that can worsen symptoms.

seekHelp.title: Seek Help if Needed
seekHelp.description: Call your doctor or emergency services if symptoms persist or worsen.

feature.monitoring: Real-time Monitoring - Track your breathing patterns and symptoms
feature.aiRisk: AI Risk Assessment - Get personalized risk predictions
feature.alerts: Environmental Alerts - Stay informed about air quality in your area

cta.title: Ready to Protect Your Health?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of Rwandans already using AsthmaShield to monitor air quality and prevent asthma attacks.

landing.title: Protect Your Lungs,
landing.subtitle: Asthma Shield uses advanced AI and real-time climate data to protect you from respiratory risks across Rwanda.

landing.climateTrackingDesc: Live temperature, humidity, and AQI updates from across all provinces in Rwanda.

landing.riskAlertsDesc: Intelligent notifications when air quality or pollen levels in your district reach risky levels.
